---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or API addition
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? What use case does it enable?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the API or behavior change you would like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you considered, and why you prefer your proposal.

## Additional Context

Anything else relevant (links, prior art, etc.).
